holdings.infoBox: JMOM is an equity ETF with a total of 280 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.39%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.57%, Alphabet at 2.02%, NVIDIA at 1.95%, and Broadcom at 1.95%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan U.S. Momentum Factor ETF (JMOM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the JP Morgan US Momentum Factor index. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap companies with strong momentum, weighted by optimized market-cap. JMOM was launched on Nov 8, 2017 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: JP Morgan US Momentum Factor Index

data.title: Enough “momentum” to carry through uncertainty?
data.text: Jay Jacobs, BlackRock head of U.S. equity ETFs, joins CNBC's Dom Chu on ‘ETF Edge' to debate the momentum trade and if it is insulated from the tariff and economic uncertainty. Nate Geraci, ETF Store ...
